channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Yet more litter at top of Stembridge road, 21st March
item.description:
Please remove the litter at top of Stembridge road yet again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st March
item.description:
12 Carlton Cortages Remove graffiti from side wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the abandoned job centre on Cambridge avenue, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish has been accumulating for months. This is not only ugly to see but also unsanitary

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Well Street building lights not on at sundown, 21st March
item.description:
External building lights on Well Street building not on at sundown. This issue has been on going for months. There was a brief period where they were on at the same time as other buildings but not any more. The entire building is in darkness. PLEASE FIX!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st March
item.description:
6 Carlton Cottages. Remove graffiti from front wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st March
item.description:
880’Old Kent Road Remove graffiti from side wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 888, Old Kent Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole I pavement surface, 21st March
item.description:
A small hole with a small vacuum underneath hasappeared. there are signs of the adjacent pavement also about give way. this is outside no 12 Knoll Road. please consider if anyone is at home at no 10 or 12 if unable to locate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knoll Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish bags left on the street , risk of vermin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Belisha beacons off on zebra crossing, 21st March
item.description:
Belisha beacons off on zebra crossing where Half Moon meets Village Way. Cars travel fast all hours so pedestrian risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Half Moon Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble flytipping, 21st March
item.description:
Flytipping concrete and door

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maria Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household furniture left on street, 21st March
item.description:
2 examples of household items thrown onto the street , Oldhill St , by SGE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wire fencing and metal rod sticking out, 21st March
item.description:
As you turn onto a20 from west hallowes towards king john walk there is redundant fenced land and the metal wire and a rod are sticking out onto the footpath. It so dangerous for walking dogs and young children. Please could you make this safe. Also loads of rubbish by the locked gate on the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup Road, Middle Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bags
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): South Eastern Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees obstructing vehicle detectors on traffic site, 21st March
item.description:
Traffic engineer found no comms with RP6 and SD3,4. Found trees obstructing comms. Trees will require trimming back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monsell Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping. Dog waste in bags. Broken barbed wire near pathway, 21st March
item.description:
King Johns walk from a20 towards kipperton drive. Broken fences. Loads of Dog waste in bags. General rubbish. Overgrown pathways. Looks horrendous. Please can you clear and put new pathway fences there .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Hallowes, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bacton Tower garden, 21st March
item.description:
Tree has clothing and rubbish bags in it. Needs removing. Camden Council garden department can not do as they do not have the equipment. They have given your details so you can arrange removing the items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117a, Wellesley Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised street tree opp 99 Benthal Road, 21st March
item.description:
Vandalised street tree (sapling) with broken / twisted branch. Must have occured friday night 20/3/26

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benthal Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of uneven paving, 21st March
item.description:
Trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Cover off wires ecposed, 21st March
item.description:
Outside no 267 New Cross Road Street light column has cover off and wires exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265E, New Cross Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Vehicle is sorn., 21st March
item.description:
This vehicle has been in Danson stables car park for the past 3 nights.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
